constraint: Personal data must be processed lawfully, fairly, and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject.
reviewer_notes: Passive legal wording. Actor is inferred as the entity that processes personal data.

actor: entity collecting or further processing personal data
action: collect and further process personal data
constraint: Personal data must be collected for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes, and must not be further processed in a manner incompatible with those purposes.
reviewer_notes: Contains an embedded negative constraint. Dominant modality is recorded as obligation because the sentence begins with a shall-clause.

condition: Processing is carried out in relation to specified purposes.
constraint: Personal data must be adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary for the purposes for which they are processed.
reviewer_notes: Data minimisation principle. Actor is inferred from passive wording.

constraint: The controller must be able to demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data.
reviewer_notes: Clear conditional obligation triggered by consent-based processing.

action: process special categories of personal data
condition: The personal data reveal racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, trade union membership, genetic data, biometric data for unique identification, health data, sex life data, or sexual orientation data.
constraint: Processing of these categories of personal data is prohibited.
reviewer_notes: Article 9(1) prohibition only. Exceptions in Article 9(2) are not included in this candidate sentence.

action: be subject to unlimited income tax liability
condition: The person has a residence or habitual abode in Austria.
constraint: The person is classified as subject to unlimited income tax liability.
reviewer_notes: German legal classification rule. Treated as definition/classification rather than an action obligation.

action: be subject to unlimited income tax liability
condition: The person has a residence or habitual abode in Austria.
constraint: Unlimited tax liability extends to all domestic and foreign income.
reviewer_notes: German legal classification rule with scope of tax liability.

action: be subject to limited income tax liability
condition: The person has neither a residence nor a habitual abode in Austria.
constraint: Limited tax liability extends only to the income listed in § 98.
reviewer_notes: German legal classification rule defining limited tax liability and its scope.
